title: [FIRRTL][CheckCombLoops] Support property types
body: This change adds support for property types to CheckCombLoops.  Right now property types show up as regular ports on instances and modules, and are assigned the through the PropAssignOp, which implements the ConnectLike interface. Module ports, instance ports, and connect like operations had to be updated to support FIRRTLTypes instead of just FIRRTLBaseTypes.
